text: If winter comes, can spring be far behind?
April hath put a spirit of youth in everything.
Spring does not ask for perfection. It only asks you to bloom again.
Even a quiet day can become music if one small note begins.
Some days are soft piano. Some days are bright violin. Both count.
Let sunlight be the stage and one tiny habit be today's song.
Remember Cramble, smile once, and let the day stay gentle.

Was I able to live inside someone's heart? Was I able to live inside your heart? Do you think you'll remember me at least a little? You'd better not hit 'reset!' Don't forget me, okay? That's a promise, okay?
Maybe there's only a dark road ahead. But you still have to believe and keep going. Believe that the stars will light your path, even a little bit. Come on... Let's go on a journey!

Sure, I know that I have no right to be feeling this way. But I still don't like it! I just don't like it. We were always together. I was always by his side. During time of joy, and grief as well. But... I realize he's far away from me now...
Music speaks. We play with the hope that our notes will reach the hearts of the ones we love.
